ORDER ON STIPULATION RE: RELEASE OF RECORDS

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-27-2007 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) & (D). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 7/2/07 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 6/22/07 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION COMPLETED IN 14 DAYS. PARTIES STIPULATED THAT MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT MAY BE HEARD 15 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE WITH 15 DAYS NOTICE. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 4/27/07, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. DEFENDANTS TO PROVIDE INFORMATION REGARDING PROPOSITION 51 WITNESSES AND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BY 5/18/07. IF DEFENDANTS LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)

REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON FEB-20-2008. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 206 ON JUL-02-2007 AT 11:15 AM FOR TRIAL. ASSIGNED FOR MANDATORY SETTLEMENT IN DEPT. 304 ON JUN-22-2007 AT 9:30 AM.
